name: LoversLotionAtk
descrip: Dizzy and intoxicated with affection, their damage is lowered!
outcome: [AttackerName] pours the erotic lubricant over [TargetName]'s body, coaxing gasping moans of pleasure as [AttackerHeOrShe] sensually masages the warm pink liquid into [TargetHisOrHer] curves.
miss: [AttackerName] goes to pour the pink lubricant over [TargetName]'s body, but the bottle ends up clattering to the floor instead, emptying its contents worthlessly.
statusOutcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffectToMonster|/|LoversLotionAtk|n|As [AttackerName] kneads [TargetName]'s skin with the lotion, [TargetHeOrShe] is left gazing at them with intoxicated passion.
